# ManagementTokenAuth

**Instance Property**

Your management token.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute string? ManagementTokenAuth;
```

## Discussion

You can obtain a management token from CloudKit Console.

For more information on authentication and management tokens see https://developer.apple.com/icloud/cloudkit/automating/
title: ManagementTokenAuth
